title: coreopsis latifolia
intro: Coreopsis latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved coreopsis, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Coreopsis latifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis latifolia include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
